description_long: This house is a spacious, multi-structure residential property set within a rectangular lot bordered by fencing and greenery. The main building features a combination of gable and hip roofs, with several dormer windows and multiple roof heights, suggesting a complex, interconnected floor plan. The exterior is predominantly light-colored, with large windows and glass doors providing ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The front yard includes a driveway and manicured shrubs, while the backyard features a pool and additional landscaping. The house is surrounded by paved walkways and has several outdoor living spaces, including patios and decks. Architectural details such as varied rooflines, prominent chimneys, and a mix of traditional and modern elements give the property a distinctive, upscale suburban character.
description: A large, light-colored suburban house with multiple gable roofs, expansive windows, and landscaped front and back yards, including a pool and patios.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, manicured shrubs, and prominent gable roofs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the property, multiple rooflines, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patios, and the back facade with large windows and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the fenced perimeter, driveway, and additional landscaping.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of Modern and Traditional elements)
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and dormers
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and prominent front door flanked by windows and landscaping
